title: Heroes — Brand Icon Generation Brief
usage: Paste `meta_prompt` into Midjourney / DALL·E / Stable Diffusion / Recraft. Append the per-icon `prompt` field when generating each icon. Generate in batches of the same category (e.g. all 12 activity icons in one session) so lighting and line character stay consistent.

brand.name: Heroes
brand.product: バーチャルチャレンジ (virtual challenge) app — walk, run, cycle across iconic Japanese routes; every completion earns a premium shipped medal and plants a tree in Japan.
voice: calm, grounded, purposeful — never shouty or 'epic'
quietly proud — craft-first, 重厚感 (weighty, substantial)
Japanese-inflected minimalism — echoes 和 (wa) restraint, woodblock-print clarity, wabi-sabi tolerance for asymmetry
inclusive — any body, any pace (walking, wheelchair, yoga all belong)
honest about numbers — shows what is, not hype
do_not_reference: hyper-gamified fitness (no flames, no lightning bolts, no exclamation marks)
generic 'app startup' clichés (no swooshes, no 3D bevel chrome)

palette.usage_note: Icons are monotone charcoal (#1A1C1E) on ivory (#F7F4F0) by default. One accent element per icon — either a single filled dot/shape, a stroke terminus, or a small-area color pop — chosen per icon from coral / amber / teal.

brand.typography_context: Site type-pair: Noto Sans JP for Japanese, Apple SF fallback for Latin. Icons must sit cleanly beside small-caps mono labels (tracking ≈ 0.3em) without optically crowding them.

icon_system.grid: 24×24 keyline grid, 20×20 artwork safe area, 2px padding on all sides

stroke.pixel_align: snap to half-pixel grid; no sub-pixel stroke widths

fills.strategy: Stroked outline as the primary form. Add ONE small solid fill (≤ ~18% of icon area) as an accent moment — typically a small circle, a single leaf/ribbon, or a blunt terminus cap.
fills.gradients: Avoid. Use flat color only. If absolutely required, only the Heroes three-stop gradient (teal → amber → coral) at 45°.

composition.baseline: All icons sit on a shared optical baseline; subjects occupy 70–85% of the safe area.
composition.negative_space: Generous interior white space; never pack to the edge.
composition.orientation: Prefer front-facing or slight 3/4 view; no aggressive perspective.
composition.asymmetry: Mild asymmetry allowed — a single offset accent dot is encouraged; avoid mirror-symmetry that feels corporate.
composition.motion_cues: If the subject is in motion (running, cycling), suggest it with ONE speed line or forward lean — never multiple trailing streaks.

allowed: brush-like end of a stroke (very subtle tapered terminus)
one tatami-proportion rectangle hint where a rectangle is needed
a single plum-blossom 5-petal mark as the 'dot' accent on culturally-Japanese icons (e.g., Fuji, sakura, 47 Ronin)
simple torii-gate silhouette in the Fuji/pilgrimage family
forbidden: stereotyped imagery (no cherry-blossom borders, no rising-sun rays, no geisha silhouettes, no ninja stars)
kanji stamped inside icons — always use actual typography alongside the icon instead

accessibility.contrast: Charcoal-on-ivory ≥ 12:1. When inverted on dark, ensure ≥ 4.5:1 against #0F1114.
accessibility.recognizability_at_16px: Icon must read correctly at 16×16 — strokes may unify into a single silhouette there; hold complexity back so thinning works.

do: ship as SVG with `currentColor` on the monotone stroke paths so the line inherits text color
put the accent fill on its own <path class='accent'> so it can be recolored per section (teal/coral/amber)
keep each icon internally consistent: stroke weight, cap style, corner radius identical across the whole set
leave transparent background; no card, no frame, no drop shadow
export at 24/48/96 as PNG fallback with 2x pixel density
dont: no gradients, no inner shadows, no glow, no emboss
no text, no numerals, no letters inside the icon
no filled outer shape containing the icon (no circle/square tile wrapper)
no skeuomorphism (no leather, no brushed steel, no paper texture)
no generic 'award ribbon' chrome for the medal icon — that's what our real medal PNGs are for

meta_prompt: Minimalist 24×24 line icon for a Japanese brand named Heroes. 1.75px rounded stroke, rounded caps and joins, charcoal (#1A1C1E) line on a transparent background. One small accent fill (≤18% area) in either coral #EC7A5C, amber #F2BE5E, or teal #375E65 per icon. Calm and grounded — think Muji / IBM Carbon / Phosphor icon systems with a quiet Japanese woodblock restraint. Front-facing or very slight 3/4 view, generous negative space, mild asymmetry welcome. Subject occupies roughly 75% of a 20×20 safe area. No gradient, no shadow, no 3D, no text, no outer frame, no tile background, no skeuomorphism, no cultural clichés. Pixel-snapped, crisp corners, consistent stroke weight across the whole set.

color_strategy.accent_path: class="accent" with fill set via CSS variable (--icon-accent) — default to the icon's suggested accent

icon_specs.subject: person mid-stride, side profile, relaxed posture
icon_specs.metaphor: slow deliberate pace — the brand's 自分のペース promise
icon_specs.accent_placement: single filled dot as the figure's head
icon_specs.composition: figure occupies right two-thirds; one small speed line on the left to imply forward motion
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist side-profile walking figure with relaxed arms, one leg forward. Head is a small filled teal circle (only colored element). Body and legs in charcoal 1.75px line, round joints. Add one short charcoal speed line behind the back heel.

icon_specs.subject: runner mid-stride, forward lean, arms swinging
icon_specs.accent_placement: one small coral dot as the hand or a single motion streak behind
icon_specs.composition: figure leaning ~15° forward, right arm back, left arm forward
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist runner mid-stride with slight forward lean. Charcoal 1.75px stroke, rounded joints. A single short coral motion line trails behind the back heel — this is the only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: cyclist from side, two wheels, simple frame, rider upright
icon_specs.accent_placement: small amber dot as the front hub
icon_specs.composition: two circles as wheels, triangular frame, simple rider silhouette
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist side-view bicycle with a small upright cyclist. Two perfect charcoal circle wheels, triangular frame, round handlebars. Front wheel hub is a filled amber dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: swimmer's head and arm breaking through three horizontal wave lines
icon_specs.accent_placement: one wavelet filled teal
icon_specs.composition: three parallel horizontal charcoal wavelets lower half; swimmer head + one extended arm upper half
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist swimmer icon: a small charcoal circle head with one extended arm breaking through three horizontal wave lines. Middle wave is filled teal — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: figure with hiking pole ascending a single mountain silhouette
icon_specs.accent_placement: small filled coral dot as the summit marker
icon_specs.composition: triangular mountain right half, figure silhouette with pole on the left ascending slope
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist hiker icon: small walking figure with a diagonal hiking pole, climbing the left slope of a single triangular mountain. A small filled coral dot sits on the summit — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: active wheelchair user, side view, leaning forward with momentum
icon_specs.accent_placement: amber dot as the pusher's head
icon_specs.composition: large wheel right, frame, pusher figure with extended arm to the rim
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist active wheelchair user icon, side view, mid-push. Charcoal 1.75px stroke, one large wheel, simple frame, small figure with extended arm touching the wheel rim. Head is a filled amber dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: rower in a thin boat with a single oar angled in water
icon_specs.accent_placement: small teal horizontal wavelet under the boat
icon_specs.composition: boat silhouette centered, oar extended right, horizontal water line beneath
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist rowing icon: slender boat silhouette with a small rower figure, single oar angled into the water on the right. One short horizontal teal wavelet sits under the hull — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: figure on a simplified elliptical trainer with oval pedal path
icon_specs.accent_placement: coral dot at the rear flywheel
icon_specs.composition: oval base, vertical handle, small figure stepping
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist elliptical trainer icon: oval pedal path base, vertical handle on the right, small charcoal figure standing on it. Rear flywheel is a filled coral dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: figure ascending a simple three-step staircase
icon_specs.accent_placement: amber dot as the figure's head
icon_specs.composition: three ascending rectangular steps diagonally, figure on the top step, arm raised
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist stair-climbing icon: three ascending rectangular steps in charcoal 1.75px stroke, a small figure on the top step with one foot lifted. Figure's head is a filled amber dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: barbell with two weight plates, centered
icon_specs.accent_placement: tiny coral dot at the left weight plate center
icon_specs.composition: horizontal bar, two rounded weight plates, short inner line
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist barbell icon: horizontal bar with two rounded weight plates on each side, plus short inner collars. Left plate has a small filled coral dot at its center — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: figure in a seated meditation / simple asana pose
icon_specs.accent_placement: small teal circle behind the head (implied halo / breath)
icon_specs.composition: cross-legged seated figure, hands resting on knees, upright spine
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist yoga icon: seated cross-legged figure, hands resting on knees, calm upright spine. A small teal filled circle sits centered behind the head as a quiet breath halo — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: figure in a plank or bridge pose on a mat line
icon_specs.accent_placement: amber dot at the figure's hand or head
icon_specs.composition: horizontal mat line at bottom, figure in simple bridge pose above
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist pilates icon: horizontal mat line at the bottom, a charcoal figure in a simple bridge pose above it (hips lifted, feet and shoulders on the mat). Head is a filled amber dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: folded map with a single pinned route node
icon_specs.accent_placement: teal pin/drop on the map
icon_specs.composition: trifold map outline, one short dashed route line, single pin
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist folded map icon: trifold rectangular outline with light creases, one short dashed route line wandering across it, and a single teal pin/drop marking a node — pin is the only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: young sapling with two leaves rising from a simple base
icon_specs.accent_placement: one teal leaf
icon_specs.composition: vertical stem, two leaves, short ground line
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist sapling icon: vertical charcoal stem with two leaves (one left, one right) above a short horizontal ground line. Right leaf is filled teal — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: medal disc with short ribbon loop
icon_specs.accent_placement: amber dot in the center of the disc
icon_specs.composition: circle with a small ribbon loop on top; optional inner concentric circle
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist medal icon: a clean circular disc with a short ribbon loop above it. Thin inner concentric circle inside the disc. A small amber dot sits in the exact center — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: three overlapping profile silhouettes (two in back, one in front)
icon_specs.accent_placement: coral dot as the front figure's head
icon_specs.composition: three head-and-shoulders silhouettes overlapping, front one slightly larger
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist community icon: three overlapping head-and-shoulder silhouettes in charcoal stroke, front figure slightly larger and centered. Front figure's head is a filled coral dot — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: five-pointed star rendered as a simple outline
icon_specs.accent_placement: single amber dot in the center
icon_specs.composition: clean 5-point star outline
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist achievement icon: a clean 5-pointed star outline in charcoal 1.75px stroke with rounded corners. A small amber filled dot sits at the exact center — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: circle with four small motion glyphs arranged around it (walker, runner, wheelchair, yoga)
icon_specs.accent_placement: one accent dot at the center of the ring
icon_specs.composition: central hollow circle, four micro-glyphs at N/E/S/W
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist inclusivity icon: a hollow central circle with four very tiny charcoal motion glyphs (walker, runner, wheelchair, yoga) placed at top/right/bottom/left. A filled coral dot sits in the center of the circle — only colored element. Keep glyphs extremely simplified.

icon_specs.subject: Mt. Fuji silhouette with snow cap
icon_specs.accent_placement: small teal dot as the summit lantern/marker
icon_specs.composition: trapezoidal mountain with a cleft snow line; horizon line below
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist Mt. Fuji icon: a flat-topped trapezoidal mountain silhouette in charcoal stroke with a small cleft (snow cap) indicated by two short interior lines. Short horizontal horizon line below. A tiny teal filled dot sits just above the summit — only colored element. No sun, no rays, no clouds.

icon_specs.subject: single horizontal sword (katana) above a torii gate outline
icon_specs.accent_placement: one coral hilt-wrap accent on the katana
icon_specs.composition: katana horizontally on top, simplified torii gate below
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist 47 Ronin icon: a horizontal katana with a straight blade and round guard on top, and a simplified torii gate outline beneath it. A short coral wrap segment on the hilt is the only colored element. Clean geometry, no decorative flourish.

icon_specs.subject: shinkansen nose in 3/4 with a pair of rails beneath
icon_specs.accent_placement: small amber dot as the headlight
icon_specs.composition: rounded-nose train front, two perspective rails below
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist shinkansen icon: rounded-nose train front view in charcoal 1.75px stroke with a small forward window outline. Two short perspective rails beneath it. A filled amber dot sits where the headlight would be — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: single five-petal sakura blossom (stylized, not ornate)
icon_specs.accent_placement: filled coral dot as the blossom center
icon_specs.composition: five rounded petals radiating evenly from a small center
icon_specs.prompt: A minimalist sakura blossom icon: five soft rounded petals in charcoal stroke radiating from a small center. The center is a filled coral dot — only colored element. Single bloom, no branch, no leaves.

icon_specs.subject: two horizontal lines
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist menu icon: two horizontal charcoal lines, upper slightly longer than lower, rounded caps. No colored accent.

icon_specs.subject: two crossed lines forming an X
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist close icon: two crossed charcoal lines at 45°, rounded caps, balanced center. No colored accent.

icon_specs.subject: downward chevron
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist downward chevron: V-shape in charcoal 1.75px stroke, rounded apex, clean angles. No colored accent.

icon_specs.subject: rightward arrow
icon_specs.accent_placement: teal arrowhead only, stem charcoal
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist rightward arrow: horizontal charcoal stem with a clean triangular arrowhead on the right. The arrowhead (only the tip shape) is filled teal — stem stays charcoal.

icon_specs.subject: magnifying glass
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist magnifying glass: a clean circle with a short angled handle at the bottom-right, both in charcoal 1.75px stroke, rounded caps. No colored accent.

icon_specs.subject: simple globe with one latitude and one meridian
icon_specs.accent_placement: single teal dot at the intersection
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist language-globe icon: a charcoal circle with one horizontal latitude line and one vertical meridian line. A filled teal dot sits where they cross — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: Twitter/X mark: two crossed diagonals
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist X social icon: two crossed diagonal strokes forming an X, charcoal 1.75px, rounded caps, balanced weight.

icon_specs.subject: rounded square with inner circle and small top-right dot
icon_specs.accent_placement: top-right dot filled coral
icon_specs.prompt: Minimalist Instagram mark: rounded-square outline with a concentric circle inside it and a tiny dot in the top-right corner. The top-right dot is filled coral — only colored element.

icon_specs.subject: Apple silhouette with leaf
icon_specs.note: Use generic silhouette only; the official Apple logo is trademarked — prefer real asset in production.
icon_specs.prompt: A generic minimalist apple silhouette icon: simple rounded apple body with a small leaf tilted right, all charcoal 1.75px stroke. No bite. Intended as a placeholder — the real App Store badge SVG should be used in production.

icon_specs.subject: right-pointing triangular play glyph
icon_specs.note: Use generic triangle only; the official Google Play logo is trademarked.
icon_specs.prompt: A generic minimalist right-pointing triangular play glyph, charcoal 1.75px stroke, rounded corners. Intended as a placeholder — the real Google Play badge SVG should be used in production.

consistency_checklist: Generate each category (activity/feature/challenge/ui/social) in one session so lighting and stroke character match.
Check that stroke weight measures identically across all icons when overlaid in Figma.
Confirm baseline alignment: place all icons at the same optical center when lined up horizontally.
Verify accent-to-base ratio stays ≤ 18% — a single small shape, never a flood.
Test at 16×16: if any icon collapses into unreadable noise, simplify the composition.
Confirm `currentColor` works: drop the SVG into a `text-coral` parent and verify the monotone lines inherit coral.

per_generator_tips.midjourney_v6: Append ` --style raw --ar 1:1 --stylize 50 --no gradient, shadow, 3d, text, frame, tile, skeuomorphism`. Generate 4 variants per subject; pick the one with the cleanest single-accent composition.
per_generator_tips.dalle_3: Natural language is fine. Prefix with 'Single icon, transparent background,' and explicitly say 'SVG-style flat line art'.
per_generator_tips.recraft_v3: Use the 'Icon' model and set the foreground color to #1A1C1E and the accent color to the per-icon accent hex. Great for keeping stroke weight consistent across a batch.
per_generator_tips.ideogram_v2: Prompt text is reliable but it tends to add subtle gradients — include 'absolutely flat color, no gradient, no shading' in the negative section.
per_generator_tips.stable_diffusion_xl: Use a 'flat icon' LoRA. Set CFG 6–8, 35 steps, width/height 1024. Prompt weights: (minimalist:1.2), (flat:1.2), (line icon:1.1). Negative: gradient, shadow, 3d, chrome, realistic, text, frame.

post_generation_pipeline: Open raster output in Figma or Illustrator; trace to vector (auto-trace OR manual redraw — manual is often cleaner).
Normalize stroke weight to exactly 1.75px at 24×24 viewbox; replace any raster stroke with a true vector path.
Remove backgrounds; ensure all fills on the monotone path are `currentColor`.
Add `class="accent"` to the accent path and parameterize via CSS `--icon-accent`.
Run through SVGO with `{removeViewBox: false, cleanupIDs: true, mergePaths: false}`.
Register in `components/ui/IconRegistry.tsx` (create if needed) with a typed key so TypeScript autocompletes icon names.

integration_hints.react_usage: Build a single `<Icon name="activity-run" accent="coral" />` component that imports the SVG sprite. Monotone lines inherit `color` from the parent; the accent path reads `--icon-accent` which the component sets based on the `accent` prop.
integration_hints.theming: For the features grid, pass the per-card accent prop. For the activity ribbon, accent cycles per row. For navigation and UI icons, leave accent unset so the icon is fully monotone.
integration_hints.dark_mode_prep: Design tokens already use `currentColor`. When/if a dark theme ships, the foreground becomes ivory and the accent stays the same saturated accent — the three accent hexes have been chosen to read on both backgrounds.
